name: dropdown-menu
title: Dropdown Menu
description: Popup menu from a trigger. Converted from shadcn ui/dropdown-menu.tsx (base-ui Menu, eleven-piece compound) — shrinks to root + item (Separator.astro already covers the separator; checkbox/radio/submenu items dropped for v1, no known consumer). side prop supports top/bottom/left/right (left/right pop the menu out beside the trigger, e.g. a sidebar-item submenu). breakout prop switches to position:fixed with JS-computed placement so the popup can escape a scrollable/overflow-clipped ancestor (e.g. Sidebar's content region) instead of being clipped at its edge. The popup is two nested elements — a frame (border/bg-popover/shadow, styled via contentClass) wrapping a scroll region (styled via scrollClass, e.g. max-h-64 overflow-y-auto plus an optional mask-image fade) — so a scroll mask never bleeds onto the popup's own border/shadow, which a single-element mask always would. class styles only the outer trigger+popup wrapper, not the popup itself. Rung-3 delegated click + ArrowUp/ArrowDown roving focus + Escape.
